title: Build the SQLite-backed Kioku storage layer
implementation_notes: Use bun:sqlite (built-in, no extra dep). Open DB at KIOKU_DB_PATH env or :memory: for tests.
Schema: table kioku_documents with columns matching KiokuIndexDocument fields.
Add a full-text search virtual table (FTS5) on title + summary + keywords JSON for the search endpoint.
Expose three operations: upsert(doc), fetchById(entityId), deleteById(entityId), search(query, limit).
Storage must be isolated — never read or write vault markdown files directly.
Export a factory: createKiokuStorage(dbPath?: string): KiokuStorage.
acceptance_criteria: upsert idempotently inserts or replaces a KiokuIndexDocument row.
fetchById returns the stored document or null when not found.
deleteById removes the document; subsequent fetchById returns null.
search(query) returns hits ranked by FTS5 relevance with entityType, entityId, score.
In-memory DB path (:memory:) is supported and used in all tests.
SQLite schema and all four operations are covered by unit tests.
completion_summary: Implemented SQLite-backed Kioku storage with FTS search, in-memory test support, and unit coverage for CRUD and query validation.
